title: psychotria capitellata
intro: Psychotria capitellata, also known as the red island or island spirit plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Psychotria capitellata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
